name: context-compression
description: 每晚压缩 Telegraph HermesGroup 各 topic 的上下文到 context-log.md
command: cd /Users/chaojin/hermesagent/Anything-to-Notion && python3 scripts/cron_context_compress.py 2>> /tmp/atn-cron.log || echo 'cron_context_compress.py not found — manual compression needed' >> /tmp/atn-cron.log
notes: 确保 agent 不会丢失关键的 Notion 数据库信息（DB ID、核心规则等）
